reason: While the tweet expresses hostility and mentions violence ('sword as medicine'), it appears to be political criticism rather than explicit ISIS ideology or terrorist content. The terms used ('ikhwanji' referring to Muslim Brotherhood) suggest internal political discourse.
original_post: لا تحاورينهم كل من يدافع عن الحق عندهم منافق اخونجي خارجي هؤلاء المباحث داء ليس لهم الا السيف دواء
